name: thronos-realestate
description: THRONOS Real Estate - Blockchain Sealed Properties with Digital Verification

scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --workspace=seal-api && npm install --workspace=seal-sdk && npm install --workspace=smart-contracts
scripts.build:all: npm run build --workspace=seal-api && npm run build --workspace=seal-sdk && npm run build --workspace=smart-contracts
scripts.test:all: npm run test --workspace=seal-api && npm run test --workspace=seal-sdk && npm run test --workspace=smart-contracts

author: THRONOS Team
